nodes.name: Query Recent Car Sightings (API)
nodes.notes: Replaces a direct Postgres query -- ingest-worker's GET /sightings/vehicles already returns exactly this shape (most-recent-first, same fields), no SQL needed here anymore. alwaysOutputData keeps the workflow going even on a zero-row response.

nodes.name: Query Recent Person Sightings (API)
nodes.notes: Replaces a direct Postgres query -- ingest-worker's GET /sightings/persons already returns exactly this shape. alwaysOutputData keeps the workflow going even on a zero-row response.
